# komodo_action (Resource)

Manages a Komodo action resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "komodo_action" "example" {
  name = "my-action"

  file_contents = "console.log(\"Hello from Komodo action!\");"

  schedule {
    format     = "Cron"
    expression = "0 0 0 * * *"
    enabled    = true
  }

  argument {
    name  = "ENVIRONMENT"
    value = "production"
  }

  argument {
    name  = "LOG_LEVEL"
    value = "info"
  }

  argument {
    name  = "TIMEOUT"
    value = "30"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The unique name of the action.

### Optional

- `argument` (Block List) Key-value arguments passed to the action as the `ARGS` variable. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--argument))
- `failure_alert_enabled` (Boolean) Whether to send an alert when the action fails.
- `file_contents` (String) TypeScript file contents using the Komodo client.
- `reload_dependencies_enabled` (Boolean) Whether to reload Deno dependencies on each run.
- `run_on_startup_enabled` (Boolean) Whether to run the action at Komodo startup.
- `schedule` (Block, Optional) Schedule configuration for the action. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--schedule))
- `tags` (List of String) A list of tag IDs to attach to this resource. Use `komodo_tag.<name>.id` to reference tags.
- `webhook` (Block, Optional) Webhook configuration for the action. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--webhook))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The action identifier (ObjectId).

<a id="nestedblock--argument"></a>
### Nested Schema for `argument`

Required:

- `name` (String) The argument name (environment variable name).
- `value` (String) The argument value.


<a id="nestedblock--schedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule`

Optional:

- `alert_enabled` (Boolean) Whether to send an alert when the action runs on schedule.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the schedule is enabled.
- `expression` (String) The schedule expression (cron string or English description).
- `format` (String) The schedule format. One of `Cron` or `English`.
- `timezone` (String) Timezone for the schedule (IANA TZ identifier, e.g. `America/New_York`). Defaults to `""` (Core local timezone).


<a id="nestedblock--webhook"></a>
### Nested Schema for `webhook`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether to allow triggering the action via webhook.
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) Override the default webhook secret for this action.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import komodo_action.example 6627c3e4f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8
```
